title: Inspirational Gifting Beautiful green leaf tree of life metal framed wall mirror for your home or garden - 64cm diameter
features: MATERIALS: Beautifully painted metal frame and glass mirror

VERSATILE STYLE: This highly decorative traditional and ornate mirror brings light to darker areas and makes smaller spaces feel bigger Suitable for indoor or outdoor use. Perfect for Patios and Conservatories, Gardens and Borders or as a charming indoor ornamental mirror!
FASTENING: Keyhole fastening on back of mirror for easy wall attachment
THOUGHTFUL GIFT: This mirror is an ideal gift for special occasions such as Birthdays, Anniversaries, Retirements, and Weddings!
CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Simply clean with a damp cloth if necessary
description: Product Description Mirrors Hand Finished Every product we sell is carefully hand finished to an exceptional standard by our team of artisans We source everything ourselves Our beautiful products are all sourced by our experienced buying team Chosen just for you We only source and sell things we love - fantastic products at great value for money for you! Picked for any home or garden With traditional and contemporary themes there is something to suit all styles and budgets Decorative Mirrors Decorative mirrors make a lovely addition to your home or garden bringing light and space to darker areas and reflecting the beauty of your borders or décor. Each mirror is carefully inspected and hand packed for you. So many choices! - visit our shop to see our whole range!
